text: Inside this modern, glass-walled corridor, the world feels ordered yet impersonal. I am a silent observer, noticing the stark quietness and minimalism. It is a place of waiting, anticipation—perhaps ideas or people will soon fill the empty meeting room behind the transparent wall. My mind drifts between the sterile clarity of the environment and the restless potential of what could emerge here. I feel detached, yet curious, as if the space invites thought but withholds warmth.
